_comment: PLACEHOLDER test set. Per Execution Plan Weeks 1-2, replace this with 100-150 real labeled examples from actual student email/Slack samples before measuring real precision/recall. This file only demonstrates the expected shape.

examples.message: I'll get you the assignment feedback by tomorrow morning, sorry for the delay.
Once I hear back from the placement cell, I'll forward the interview slot to you.
Professor said she'll share the corrected grades sometime this week.
We should catch up sometime after finals.
The meeting has been moved to 4 PM in the same room.
